title: DCM Audit Record (Stage-2, enriched)
description: Machine-validatable enriched audit record (observability/universal-audit.md §3; DCM ADR-010). The tamper-evident system-of-what-happened. Append-only, immutable once written (AUD-002); RFC 9162 Merkle-linked (AUD-006). UDLM carries the record shape; DCM's Audit Service produces it. data-model-core §2 [D8.5].

record_timestamp.description: When the change occurred, RFC 3339 UTC 'Z' (millisecond precision permitted; common-elements §8.1).

action_detail.description: Structured per-action detail (open — shape varies by action).

retention_status.description: AUD-003/004 lifecycle: live while any referenced entity is non-terminal; policy_governed retention only after all reach terminal state.

audit_leaf_uuid.description: Link to the Merkle leaf (audit-leaf.schema.json) binding this record into the tamper-evident tree.

commit_log_entry_uuid.description: Link back to the Stage-1 commit_log_entry this was enriched from.

allOf.$comment: SPEC-DESIGN §Relationships 18d/18e: a relationship mutation MUST carry an explicit, self-describing resulting-state detail so LIFO reconstruction (18c) works and an undo/revert is recorded as a forward result, never a differential.

ADR-PROV-003: a provider capability-admission change (admit/provision/scope/deny/revoke) is an admin decision that MUST be audited and PERMANENT. Recorded as an explicit forward event carrying the RESULTING disposition (+ actor + reason), never a destructive edit; the current admission is the LIFO-newest CAPABILITY_ADMIT for the (provider, capability) pair — same durability model as relationship_mutation (18c/18e).

relationship_mutation.description: Explicit, self-describing relationship-edge event (SPEC-DESIGN §Relationships 18a-e). Records the RESULTING edge state, not a differential — enabling audit-based, LIFO rebuild/confirm of relationships (18c). An undo/revert resolves to one of these explicit results (18e).

source_uuid.description: The dependent/subordinate resource that declares the edge — the authoritative side (18a).

target_uuid.description: The target resource; authoritative reference (18b) — must resolve.

target_handle.description: Advisory only; target_uuid is authoritative (never name alone).

resulting_state.description: The edge's state AFTER this event — explicit forward state (18e). RELATIONSHIP_CREATE -> present, RELATIONSHIP_RELEASE -> absent. An undo/revert is recorded as one of these explicit results, never as a differential.

capability_admission.description: Explicit, self-describing provider capability-admission event (ADR-PROV-003). Records the RESULTING PLATFORM-LEVEL admin disposition of one (provider × capability/category), not a differential — enabling audit-based LIFO reconstruction of the current admission (the newest CAPABILITY_ADMIT wins). This is the COARSE, platform-level admit; GRANULAR/conditional approval (per tenant/zone/resource/context) is POLICY (Governance-Matrix rules), NOT recorded here (no scope field). A revoke/override resolves to an explicit resulting_disposition (e.g. denied), never an undo. Admin identity (actor) and reason are REQUIRED — admin changes are audited and permanent.

provider_uuid.description: The provider whose declared capability is being dispositioned.

capability.description: The capability or capability category being admitted — a (verb × domain) term handle from the provider-capability taxonomy (e.g. `realize_resources/Storage`). ADR-PROV-002.

resulting_disposition.description: The admission disposition AFTER this event — explicit forward state. A revoke of a prior `approved` is recorded as resulting_disposition `denied` (an explicit result, not an undo). `provisional` = admitted but restricted/shadowed (reuses the federation provisional posture). ADR-PROV-003.

prior_disposition.description: Advisory: the disposition immediately before this event (LIFO already yields it; recorded for a self-describing chain).

actor.description: The platform_admin (RBAC role) who made this admission decision. REQUIRED — the change is attributed and permanent.

reason.description: Admin justification for the disposition. REQUIRED (mirrors the accreditation/override approval flows: a stored reason on every admin decision).
